learnerProfile.title: Learner Profile
learnerProfile.description: See what Lextures has learned about how you learn — and exactly where each insight comes from.
learnerProfile.error.load: Could not load your learner profile. Try again in a moment.
learnerProfile.howItWorks.title: How this works
learnerProfile.howItWorks.body: Your learner profile is built automatically from your activity across courses. It is never entered manually, and you own it. Each insight below shows where it came from, when it was last updated, and how confident we are.
learnerProfile.howItWorks.art22: The profile and features that use it are assistive and advisory only. Lextures does not use your learner profile for consequential automated decisions without meaningful human oversight.
learnerProfile.privacy.notice: Your profile data is handled in line with FERPA and GDPR. Visit the Privacy Center to manage consent and data requests.
learnerProfile.empty.title: Your profile is still building
learnerProfile.empty.body: Keep learning — as you engage with courses, quizzes, and study tools, insights will appear here. We never guess before there is enough evidence.
learnerProfile.paused.title: Profile updates are paused
learnerProfile.paused.body: Your learner profile is not being updated right now. Resume updates when you are ready, or manage your profile below.
learnerProfile.manage.title: Manage your profile
learnerProfile.manage.description: Download a portable copy, pause updates, or permanently reset your learner profile.
learnerProfile.manage.error: That action could not be completed. Try again in a moment.
learnerProfile.manage.pauseConfirm.title: Pause profile updates?
learnerProfile.manage.pauseConfirm.body: Your profile will stay as it is and will not be updated from new activity until you resume.
learnerProfile.manage.resumeConfirm.body: Lextures will start updating your profile again from your learning activity.
learnerProfile.manage.resetConfirm.title: Reset your learner profile?
learnerProfile.manage.resetConfirm.body: This permanently deletes all profile insights and evidence. It cannot be undone. Your profile will rebuild from future activity unless you also pause updates.
learnerProfile.facet.studyRhythm.title: Study rhythm
learnerProfile.facet.studyRhythm.descrip: When and how consistently you study.
learnerProfile.facet.contentModality.des: The content formats and pacing that fit you best.
learnerProfile.facet.strengthsGrowth.des: Concepts you have mastered and areas to develop.
learnerProfile.facet.interests.title: What you're drawn to
learnerProfile.facet.interests.descripti: Topics and subjects you engage with most.
learnerProfile.facet.learningApproach.de: How you persist, seek help, and consolidate learning.
learnerProfile.facet.insufficient: Not enough data yet for this section.
learnerProfile.facet.error: This section could not be loaded. Other sections are still available.
learnerProfile.insight.label.modalityAff: How you engage with each format
learnerProfile.insight.label.contentPaci: How thoroughly you work through content
learnerProfile.insight.genericUnknown: Insight details are not available yet.
learnerProfile.insight.studyRhythm.peak: You study most on {day} around {hour} ({share}% of activity).
learnerProfile.insight.studyRhythm.peakU: Your peak study window is still emerging.
learnerProfile.insight.studyRhythm.consi: Consistency score {score}% with about {daysPerWeek} active days per week.
learnerProfile.insight.studyRhythm.strea: Current streak {current} days; longest streak {longest} days.
learnerProfile.insight.studyRhythm.sessi: Typical session about {minutes} minutes; {perWeek} sessions per active week.
learnerProfile.insight.modality.top: You engage most with {modality} content ({share}% affinity).
learnerProfile.insight.modality.pacing: You tend to work through content at a {pacing} pace.
learnerProfile.insight.approach.persiste: Persistence level: {level}{productive, select, true { (productive retakes)} other {}}.
learnerProfile.insight.approach.helpSeek: Help-seeking style: {style}; about {hints} hints per attempt.
learnerProfile.evidence.derivedFrom: Derived from {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}}{courses, plural, =0 {} one { across # course} other { across # courses}}
learnerProfile.evidence.empty: No detailed evidence is available for this insight.
learnerProfile.evidence.table.caption: Evidence sources for this insight
learnerProfile.confidence.label: Confidence: {level}
learnerProfile.chart.rhythm.caption: Study activity by day and hour
learnerProfile.chart.modality.caption: Engagement by content format
